business_question: Which procedures are generating the largest financial leakage?
business_context: Clinical finance and reimbursement teams want to identify high-cost procedures that are creating the greatest reimbursement exposure and denial risk.
chain_of_thought: Step 1: Identify financially risky procedures needing intervention.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    PROCEDURE_NAME,
    COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_CLAIMS,
    SUM(REVENUE_LOSS_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_LEAKAGE,
    ROUND(SUM(REVENUE_LOSS_AMOUNT)/COUNT(*),2) AS AVG_LEAKAGE_PER_CLAIM
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.HEALTHCARE.MART_REVENUE_LEAKAGE
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY TOTAL_LEAKAGE DESC;
